data.body: PASS-2 independent verification (overlays-triggering child plan). Note for the record: most "undefined / deferred / no-decomposition / no-MVP" findings against the slim T1-T12 child plan do NOT hold once re-grounded in the authoritative artifacts — criteria_v8.json fully defines each trigger (scenario/checklist/applies_at levels/exec/overlay_routing field), the epic body enumerates which overlays are deterministic vs LLM-routed and records the E4 router-precision measurement (det T12 7/19 false; LLM router 0), names the eval corpus (DSO/snap/rebar), and states the risk-ordered MVP build order + 11-child decomposition. registry.py:198-215 (route_criteria) implements applies_at-before-trigger ordering and the LLM-routed-overlay default-into-finder behavior. The genuinely-open residual is the LLM relevance router's failure/timeout/uncertainty CONTRACT (fire/suppress/INDETERMINATE default), which is documented for sibling concerns (robust_findings synth-INDETERMINATE) but not stated as the router's own contract here.
